[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1011110111 8
1 0001001100 3
2 0000111111 6
3 0111110011 7
4 1111110111 9
5 1100111110 7
6 1111110111 9
7 0001111100 5

01 10 1111110101 8
12 21 1011110111 8 match 0
23 32 1011111111 9
34 43 0001111111 7
45 54 0111111111 9
56 65 1111110011 8
67 76 1110111110 8
70 07 1111111111 a

02 20 1111110111 9 match 4 6
13 31 0001111100 5 match 7
24 42 1011111111 9
35 53 0111111111 9
46 64 1110111111 9
57 75 1111111111 a
60 06 1111110111 9 match 4 6
71 17 1100111110 7 match 5

03 30 1111011101 8
14 41 0000111111 6 match 2
25 52 1111110111 9 match 4 6
36 63 1111101110 8
47 74 1100111111 8
50 05 1111110111 9 match 4 6
61 16 1110110110 7
72 27 1111111111 a

04 40 1111111111 a
15 51 0111110111 8
26 62 1111110111 9 match 4 6
37 73 1101111110 8
